global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large oval and a rectangle are centered, overlapping slightly, in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Two small circles are placed near the bottom left, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Escape this weekend' is prominently displayed in bold, white font, centered in the lower half of the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline reads 'Flexible booking options' in a clean, white font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small white label with the text 'UGC' is positioned in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center reads 'Book now' in bold, white text against a darker orange background.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The text 'RouteBloom SALE' is displayed in bold, black font at the top of the ad, with a yellow highlight on 'SALE'.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: The text 'Book now' appears in a smaller font at the bottom right, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: UGC indicator
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' is placed in the top left corner, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subject in the center, and CTA at the bottom.
